author: dashboard-bootstrap
content:
Plan: Implementing GH#576 publishing pipeline.

Files I'll touch:
1. NEW .github/workflows/container-image.yml — multi-arch (amd64+arm64) workflow with: PR validate (no push), develop push -> :nightly + :nightly-<sha>, tag v* -> :<version> + :latest. Builds binaries via matrix (musl x86_64 + aarch64), uploads as artifacts, downloads in docker job. Uses TARGETARCH in build context to pick correct binary. Final smoke-verify job pulls and runs the just-pushed tag, asserts crosslink --version matches.
2. EDIT crosslink/resources/container/Dockerfile — replace 'gosu-amd64' hardcode with TARGETARCH ARG (gosu-${TARGETARCH}). Replace 'COPY crosslink' with 'COPY crosslink-${TARGETARCH}' so the right binary lands per platform.
3. EDIT justfile — add 'build-image [tag=local]' recipe: builds linux musl binary for host arch then docker buildx build --load -t ghcr.io/forecast-bio/crosslink-agent:<tag>. Add companion 'push-image' for emergency manual publish.
4. EDIT .gitignore — exclude crosslink/resources/container/crosslink-* (binary artifacts) while preserving Dockerfile and entrypoint.sh.
5. EDIT crosslink/src/commands/kickoff/launch.rs — extract a helper format_container_launch_error() that detects 'not found'/'denied'/'manifest unknown'/'no such image' substrings and appends a hint about 'just build-image' + GHCR package URL.
6. NEW unit tests in launch.rs (or sibling tests.rs) for the helper.

Architectural decisions already approved by user/architect (per pre-flight):
- Multi-arch linux/amd64 + linux/arm64 (no half-fix)
- :nightly floats from develop (not main)
- Combine error message with this PR (one logical change)
- NO multi-stage Dockerfile (out of scope)
- NO bundling rust toolchain in runtime image
- NO :latest as workflow input default
